/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_fog.dir/tests/test_fog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_fog.dir/src/fog/FogSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_fog.dir/src/renderer/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_fog.dir/extern/vma/vma_impl.cpp.o -o test_fog  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglm.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libvulkan.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libspdlog.1.17.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfmt.12.1.0.dylib
